title: Phonics Paper 1
subject: Phonics
description: Beginning sounds, rhyming words, vowels, and blends

sections.name: Section A – Beginning Sounds
sections.instruction: Circle the word that begins with the same sound as the picture.

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'ball'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'b' sound at the start!

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'fish'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'f' sound at the start!

questions.prompt: Which word begins with the same sound as 'tree'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 't' sound at the start!

sections.name: Section B – Matching Sounds
sections.instruction: Match the beginning sound to the correct word.

questions.prompt: Match each sound to its word:
questions.hint: Say each word slowly and listen to the first sound!

sections.name: Section C – Word Families (Rhyming Words)
sections.instruction: Choose the word that rhymes with the first word.

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'cat'?
questions.hint: Rhyming words have the same ending sound. Cat ends in -at!

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'sun'?
questions.hint: Sun ends in -un. Which other word ends in -un?

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'hill'?
questions.hint: Hill ends in -ill. Find the word that sounds the same!

sections.name: Section D – Short Vowel Sounds
sections.instruction: Choose the correct vowel to complete each word.

questions.prompt: c _ t (a furry pet)
questions.hint: Think of the sound in the middle of 'cat'!

questions.prompt: p _ g (a pink farm animal)
questions.hint: Think of the sound in the middle of 'pig'!

questions.prompt: b _ d (where you sleep)
questions.hint: Think of the sound in the middle of 'bed'!

questions.prompt: s _ n (it shines in the sky)
questions.hint: Think of the sound in the middle of 'sun'!

sections.name: Section E – Blends
sections.instruction: Fill in the missing blend: bl, cl, st, tr

questions.prompt: ___ock (a block you play with)
questions.hint: Say 'block' slowly. What sound do you hear at the start?

questions.prompt: ___ap (you wear it on your head)
questions.hint: A 'cap' keeps your head warm!

questions.prompt: ___ar (you ride in it)
questions.hint: A 'car' has four wheels!

questions.prompt: ___ar (you can see it in the sky at night)
questions.hint: Stars twinkle at night!

sections.name: Section F – Ending Sounds
sections.instruction: Type the last sound (letter) you hear.

questions.prompt: do__ (What letter do you hear at the end of 'dog'?)
questions.hint: Say 'dog' slowly. What's the last sound?

questions.prompt: bu__ (What letter do you hear at the end of 'bus'?)
questions.hint: Say 'bus' slowly. What's the last sound?

questions.prompt: ri__ (What letter do you hear at the end of 'rib'?)
questions.hint: Say 'rib' slowly. What's the last sound?

sections.name: Section G – Long and Short Vowels
sections.instruction: Choose the word with the long vowel sound.

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: Long vowels say their name! 'A' says 'ay' in the long sound.

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: Long vowels say their name! 'I' says 'eye' in the long sound.

questions.prompt: Which word has a LONG vowel sound?
questions.hint: Long vowels say their name! 'O' says 'oh' in the long sound.

sections.name: Section H – Choose the Correct Word
sections.instruction: Circle the correct word to complete each sentence.

questions.prompt: I can ___ with Mum at the market.
questions.hint: You 'shop' when you buy things!

questions.prompt: The ___ is with the hen.
questions.hint: A baby chicken is called a ___.

questions.prompt: Dad will ___ the van.
questions.hint: You ___ a car or van to make it move.

sections.name: Section I – Spelling
sections.instruction: Type the correct word for each description.

questions.prompt: A place with many books:
questions.hint: You borrow books from the ___.

questions.prompt: A big yellow fruit (popular in Jamaica!):
questions.hint: This sweet fruit grows on trees in Jamaica!

questions.prompt: You wear this on your foot:
questions.hint: You put on your ___ before going outside.
